channel.title: Help Desk Career on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Help Desk Career on simeononsecurity

item.title: IT Career Specializations: Choosing Your Path in Information Technology
item.category: "IT specializations" , "IT career paths" , "help desk career" , "systems administrator" , "cloud engineer career" , "DevOps career" , "network engineer career" , "IT security career" , "database administrator" , "IT management career"
item.description: A comprehensive overview of every major IT specialization — help desk, sysadmin, networking, cloud, DevOps, security, and more — with the skills and certifications each requires.
